dealSummary: Vast Data, the developer of AI data storage software, raised a $1 billion Series F led by Drive Capital and Access Industries at a $30 billion valuation.
Nuclear power plant startup Blue Energy secured a $380 million round led by VXI Capital and Engine Ventures.
Autonomous aircraft system provider Reliable Robotics received a $160 million round led by Nimble Partners.
Ray Therapeutics, a biopharma startup focused on retinal diseases, raised a $125 million Series B led by Janus Henderson Investors.
Healthtech startup Courier Health raised a $50 million Series B led by Oak HC/FT.
AI research lab NeoCognition secured a $40 million seed round led by Cambium Capital and Walden Catalyst Ventures.
Afresh, the developer of an AI platform for grocery stores, raised a $34 million round led by Just Climate and High Sage Ventures.
Monk, the developer of an AI accounts receivable platform, received a $25 million Series A led by Footwork and Acrew Capital.
Mosaic, which develops a deal-modeling platform for private markets secured an $18 million Series A led by Radical Ventures.
Atmos Space Cargo, a German orbital transport developer, raised a €25.7 million series A co-led by Balnord and Expansion.
